footer.title: MovieHub - movies and series online
footer.description1: We are glad to welcome all fans of interesting and high-quality cinema to MovieHub! Do you love cinematography as much as we do? Constantly follow new releases? Not a single evening goes by without you watching a couple of movies?
footer.description2: Then you've come to exactly the right place! In our cinema, you can watch movies online for free and without any restrictions!
footer.collectionText: Specially for our valued users, we have tried to collect the best collection of movies of various genres, times, and nations! The project team constantly monitors the release of movies and regularly adds films so that you can be among the first to enjoy both the world's best masterpieces and new releases for free!
footer.genresText: Here you will find the best movies of the "Golden Age" of Hollywood, classic European cinema, the best French comedies, Asian cinema, Soviet films, and modern hits of various years.
footer.genresList: We have collected an impressive collection of action movies and thrillers, fantasy and sci-fi, dramas and melodramas, here you will also find comedies, horrors, adventure, and historical films.
footer.searchConvenience: Specially for your convenience, there is a search bar on the site, thanks to which you can quickly find the desired movie. We try to satisfy the requests of a wide range of viewers, so we promptly add new movies almost immediately after their release.
footer.partnership: Our cinema is ready to become a loyal partner and assistant in the world of cinema!
